seedLabel: Local operator-reviewed monthly report scaffold — not final client copy or live analytics
verificationRequiredNotes: Hospital, accreditation, partner, and license claims require verification before publication.
Monthly report recommendations are planning guidance only — without outcome promises.
Placeholder metrics are manual snapshots for local proof; live GA/GSC OAuth is deferred.
releaseStateNotes: Final release package is not finalized for foundation scaffold projects.

Client portal monthly reports remain hidden until admin promotes report status to FINAL.

recommendationTemplates.recommendation: Prioritize medical review for high-risk service planning items before expanding draft production or client-facing release steps.
recommendationTemplates.rationale: Several planned SEO and draft scaffolds require prescriber or compliance review under Puriva taxonomy rules.

recommendationTemplates.recommendation: Resolve verification-required trust, license, and facility claims with operator-approved evidence before publishing stem cell or hospital-partner oriented content.
recommendationTemplates.rationale: Market intelligence and SEO planning flagged verification-required topics that must not be stated as approved facts.

recommendationTemplates.recommendation: Continue foundation-stage SEO planning for remaining service categories using educational, consultation-first positioning without outcome promises.
recommendationTemplates.rationale: Taxonomy coverage and MI gap categories support next-month planning for informational and commercial investigation intents.

recommendationTemplates.recommendation: Keep image prompt scaffolds internal until medical review and verification gates clear; use alt-text drafts for compliance review only.
recommendationTemplates.rationale: Image packages remain internal admin scaffolds linked to content production items.

recommendationTemplates.recommendation: Maintain approved manual metric snapshots for monthly reporting until live GA/GSC integration is explicitly enabled; do not present placeholder metrics as audited performance results.
